zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford於1340年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，他的父親Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy36歲，母親Catharina Herzogin von Österreich20歲。他於1365年7月27日與Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年2月18日在土耳其布爾薩享年57歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford于1340年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，他的父亲Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy36岁，母亲Catharina Herzogin von Österreich20岁。他于1365年7月27日与Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年2月18日在土耳其布爾薩享年57岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford was born in 1340, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy, was 36 and his mother, Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, was 20. He married Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford on 27 July 1365, in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 18 February 1397, in Bursa, Türkiye, at the age of 57, and was buried in Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford est né en 1340, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford le 27 juillet 1365, à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 février 1397, à Bursa, Turquie, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford 1340 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy 36 und seine Mutter Catharina Herzogin von Österreich 20. Er hat am 27. Juli 1365 in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1397 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bursa, Türkei und wurde in Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford è nato il nel 1340 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford il 27 luglio 1365, nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1397, nel Bursa, Turchia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedfordが1340年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucyは36歳，母Catharina Herzogin von Österreichは20歳であった。1365年7月27日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルでIsabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年2月18日にトルコブルサで57歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンソイソンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford(이)가 1340년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina Herzogin von Österreich(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1365년 7월 27일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 2월 18일 튀르키예 버사에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 소이손스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford nasceu em 1340, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford em 27 de julho de 1365, em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1397, em Bursa, Turquia, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford родился в 1340 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford 27 июля 1365 г. в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 18 февраля 1397 г. в местности бурса, Турция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности соиссонс, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford nació en 1340, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Catharina Herzogin von Österreich, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford el 27 de julio de 1365, en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1397, en Bursa, Turquía, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
